value.content: RA-MoE is a sparse mixture-of-experts routing scheme that biases experts by activation history to reduce latency.
{"title": "Routing-Aware Sparse Mixture-of-Experts for Latency-Bounded Inference", "authors": ["A. Garcia", "K. Sato", "M. Owens"]}
